query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "opid: on-policy skill distillation for agentic reinforcement learning" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it investigates the same core mechanism of on-policy reinforcement learning for resolving misunderstandings in language-conditioned agents, providing empirical evidence on the specific domain of linguistic instruction-following and action correction that the user's question targets.
